task: Complete first-three observed sessions EI-001 through EI-003.
trigger: Current active candidate is in first-three gate.

task: If first-three passes, run EI-004 through EI-010.
done_when: ExternalTestGateReport recommends pass or fail after 10 sessions.

task: Keep fallback build and smoke readiness green.
done_when: BodyRebelsFallbackSmokeReport remains PASS after source changes.

task: Prepare and run BR-001 through BR-003.
trigger: Everyone Innocent returns PATCH_OR_SWITCH or fails 10-person gate.

task: Run manual 3-minute hook pass and update scorecard.
trigger: Both higher-ranked candidates fail or capacity is available.
done_when: Intended Feature has comparable first-read evidence.
